sections.paragraph:
Original: נעים

Transliteration: nâ‛ı̂ym

Phonetic: naw-eem'

BDB Definition:

  1. pleasant, delightful, sweet, lovely, agreeable
    1. delightful
    2. lovely, beautiful (physical)
  2. singing, sweetly sounding, musical

Origin: from H5276

TWOT entry: 1384b,1385a

Part(s) of speech: Adjective
